sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15246" key="a(rmatophge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρμᾰτο-πηγέω</orth>, <sense id="n15246.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">build chariots,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
